concepts.site_goal: Serve as the unified digital hub for the Sunridge Unified School District, helping families find their neighborhood school, log into the parent portal, scan calendars and lunch menus, and stay current on board decisions and district news.
audience: prospective families relocating to the district
concepts.description: Sunridge Unified School District (SUSD) website with a bright, playful identity: sunny pastel palette of butter yellow, sky blue, peach, mint, and lavender on a warm off-white canvas. Chunky rounded sans-serif (Fraunhofer-style display) for headings, soft humanist sans for body. Medium-density layouts with rounded card stacks, dotted dividers, sticker-style icons, and a persistent left-rail navigation tree that expands sections for Academics, Families, and Staff. The homepage stitches together a school finder map, a weekly calendar strip, lunch menu of the day, latest board agenda, and a news bulletin board. Pages keep a friendly, scholastic tone with announcement banners, bus alerts, and clear bilingual toggles (English / Español).
concepts.motif: Sunny pastel sticker book: rounded cards, dotted divider rules, soft drop shadows, hand-drawn icon stickers (apple, bus, pencil, sun), and a left-rail folder-tree feel reminiscent of a school binder.

pages.layout_pattern: Two-column shell with persistent left-rail nav tree and a multi-zone right canvas: hero announcement band, school finder map card, today's lunch + bell schedule strip, news bulletin grid, and a board-meeting countdown footer
sections: District-wide alert ribbon (e.g. snow day, bus delay) at the very top
Hero greeting block with superintendent welcome and rotating student artwork
School finder mini-map with ZIP/address input and 'Find My School' button
This Week at SUSD: 7-day calendar strip with color-coded events
Today's lunch menu card (elementary / middle / high tabs) with allergen icons
News & announcements bulletin grid (3-up cards)
Upcoming board meeting countdown + agenda link
Quick links sticker row: Parent Portal, Bus Routes, Enroll, Pay Fees, Report Absence
Footer with bilingual toggle, accessibility statement, and district contact

pages.layout_pattern: Split view: interactive boundary map on the left half, filterable list of schools as rounded cards on the right; address search bar pinned to the top
sections: Address / ZIP search with 'Find My Attendance Zone' button
Filter chips: Elementary, Middle, High, Magnet, Pre-K, Adult Ed
Boundary map with color-coded zones and school pins
School cards (photo, principal, grades served, enrollment, bell time, phone)
Compare-up-to-3 schools tray at the bottom
Bus route lookup CTA card
Transfer / open-enrollment information callout

pages.layout_pattern: Login-forward page: centered sign-in card on a pastel gradient panel, with a benefits sidebar and post-login dashboard preview below the fold
sections: Sign-in card with username, password, 'Forgot login', and SSO with Google Classroom
First-time user 'Activate your account' walkthrough with claim code field
What you can do in the Portal: grades, attendance, lunch balance reload, bus tracker, teacher messages
Mobile app download row (iOS / Android badges)
Help & support: 'I lost my activation letter', live chat hours, phone tree
Privacy and FERPA statement strip

pages.layout_pattern: Tabbed curriculum hub with grade-band tabs (Pre-K, Elementary, Middle, High) above a three-column subject grid; left-rail tree stays visible
sections: Grade-band tab strip with illustrated headers
Subject tiles: ELA, Math, Science, Social Studies, World Languages, Arts, PE, CTE
Standards & report card explainer accordion
Special programs: Gifted, Dual Language Immersion, Special Education, MTSS
High school course catalog PDF + Naviance link
Graduation requirements infographic
Assessment calendar (state tests, MAP, AP)
Family resources: 'Help your child with math at home' tip cards

pages.layout_pattern: Full-bleed month grid with color legend sidebar, school filter dropdown, and a synced agenda list panel underneath
sections: Year/month switcher with 'Today' jump button
School filter (All schools, individual campuses) and category filter (Holidays, Early Release, Board, Athletics, Arts)
Color-coded month grid with sticker-style event chips
Agenda list below the grid with downloadable .ics per event
Subscribe to calendar feed (Google, Apple, Outlook) buttons
Print PDF year-at-a-glance link
Recurring lunch menu link card

pages.layout_pattern: Civic-style index page: trustee roster on top as a row of pastel circular portraits, then upcoming meeting card, then a chronological table of past agendas and minutes with search and filter
sections: Board of Trustees roster with photos, areas, terms, and 'Email this trustee' buttons
Next meeting card: date, time, location, livestream link, agenda PDF, public comment sign-up
Meeting archive table: date, type (Regular/Special/Workshop), agenda, minutes, video
Policies & bylaws searchable index
Public comment guidelines explainer
Strategic plan and budget documents accordion

pages.layout_pattern: Editorial bulletin board: large featured story on the left, masonry of recent news cards on the right, and a sidebar with newsletter signup and press contact
sections: Featured news hero with photo, headline, dek, byline
Filter pills: All, District News, School Spotlights, Athletics, Arts, Bond Updates
Masonry of dated news cards with thumbnail and 1-line dek
Newsletter signup card ('Sunridge Weekly')
Press kit + media contact sidebar
Social media row (district Facebook, Instagram, YouTube)

pages.layout_pattern: Single utility page combining a route lookup form, a route map, an alerts feed, and a downloadable bell + bus schedule table
sections: Address lookup 'Find my bus stop' form
Live bus delay alerts feed (timestamped)
Route detail card: route number, driver, stops list with pickup times
Interactive route map with stop pins
Eligibility & fees explainer accordion
Lost & found and behavior expectations callouts

message_intent: Reassure families that the district is organized, welcoming, and bilingual-accessible
Make it trivially easy to find your child's school, bus stop, and lunch info
Project transparency around board governance and budget
Celebrate student work and community pride through warm imagery and news
Communicate urgent disruptions (weather, bus delays) prominently without panic
content_model: School: name, level, address, principal, phone, photo, bell times, enrollment, attendance zone polygon, programs
CalendarEvent: title, start, end, category, applicable schools, color, ics link
BoardMeeting: date, type, agenda PDF, minutes PDF, video URL, public comment slots
NewsArticle: headline, dek, body, hero image, category, author, publish date, tags
LunchMenu: date, level, entrees, sides, allergens, nutrition PDF
BusRoute: number, school served, stops [{address, pickup_time, dropoff_time}], driver, alerts
Trustee: name, photo, area, term_start, term_end, email, bio
Program: name, description, eligible_grades, contact, schools_offered
Alert: severity, message, start, end, scope (district/school)
interactions: Address-to-school finder with autocomplete and map zoom
Bilingual English / Español toggle persisted in a cookie
Left-rail tree nav with expand/collapse and active section highlight
Calendar filter chips and 'Subscribe' feed export
Compare-up-to-3 schools tray that slides up from bottom
Sign-in card with show/hide password and SSO buttons
Bus route lookup with autocomplete and 'View on map' deep link
News filter pills with masonry re-flow
Print-friendly PDF buttons on calendar and board pages
asset_needs: Hand-drawn sticker icon set (apple, bus, pencil, sun, book, music note, soccer ball)
Photo set of students, classrooms, and campuses (diverse, smiling)
concepts.mobile_behavior: Left-rail tree collapses into a top hamburger that opens a full-screen drawer; multi-column dashboards stack into a single column with sticky alert ribbon; calendar month grid becomes an agenda list with a month switcher; school finder map becomes a tap-to-expand card above the school list.

concepts.site_goal: Provide the Maple Hollow Community Schools community with a cheerful, low-friction portal where parents and students can navigate seven campuses, manage daily logistics (lunch, bus, attendance), and engage with district academics and governance.
audience: elementary, middle, and high school students
concepts.description: Maple Hollow Community Schools (MHCS) website with a sunny pastel palette anchored by lemon, robin's-egg blue, blush, sage, and apricot on a creamy paper background. Chunky rounded display type (Recoleta-rounded vibe) for headlines, friendly geometric sans for body, with crayon-like underline accents and notebook-margin rules. Medium-density layouts arranged like a kid's binder: tabbed dividers, sticker stamps, and a persistent left-rail collapsible nav tree grouping Academics / Families / Staff / About. The site leans heavily on logistical tools — a campus finder with bus overlay, a 'My Week' calendar, weekly lunch menus, attendance reporting, and a board agenda hub — while keeping a warm, hand-crafted school identity.
concepts.motif: Spiral-bound binder with pastel tabbed dividers, ruled notebook lines, crayon underlines, and washi-tape highlights. Section headers feel like dymo label-maker tags; cards have a slight paper texture and soft drop shadow.

pages.layout_pattern: Three-zone front page: persistent left-rail binder nav, central canvas with stacked sticker cards (alert, hero, quick tools), and a right rail with a 'This Week' agenda and weather/bell schedule snippet
sections: Top alert strip with rotating district notices and bus delays
Hero card: 'Welcome to Maple Hollow' with student-of-the-month spotlight
Quick tools sticker row: Find My School, Report Absence, Pay Fees, Lunch Menu, Bus Routes, Portal Login
Featured news mosaic (3-up cards) with category tags
This Week agenda right rail with color-coded events
Today's bell schedule + early release flag
Superintendent Friday Note teaser card
Community partners marquee (library, parks, YMCA)
Footer with translations dropdown (English, Spanish, Vietnamese, Somali) and ADA statement

pages.layout_pattern: Grid of seven large pastel school cards above a shared interactive boundary map; toggle between 'Grid' and 'Map' view; sticky filter rail
sections: View toggle (Grid / Map) and grade-level filter chips
School cards: mascot illustration, grades, principal, phone, address, 'Visit School Site' arrow
Boundary & bus overlay map with layer toggles
Address search 'Which school serves my home?'
Magnet & choice programs callout
Enrollment & registration steps stepper
Open house dates carousel

pages.layout_pattern: Two-panel page: left panel is a sign-in card with role tabs (Parent / Student / Staff), right panel is a feature showcase with screenshots of grades, attendance, and lunch balance
sections: Role tabs (Parent, Student, Staff) above sign-in form
Sign-in card with username, password, 'Stay signed in', SSO with Clever and Google
Account help block: 'Need an activation code?', district help desk hours
Feature showcase: Grades & Report Cards, Attendance, Lunch Balance, Bus Tracker, Forms & Permission Slips
Mobile app download badges and QR code
Notifications preferences explainer
FERPA & data privacy strip

pages.layout_pattern: Curriculum binder: top horizontal tab strip for grade bands, beneath it a two-column layout with subject accordion list on the left and program spotlight cards on the right
sections: Grade-band tabs (Early Learning, Elementary K-5, Middle 6-8, High 9-12)
Subject accordion (ELA, Math, Science, Social Studies, World Languages, Arts, PE & Health, CTE)
Program spotlight cards: Dual Language, STEAM Lab, AVID, IB Diploma, CTE Pathways
Graduation pathways infographic
Standardized testing calendar with explainers
Library & media center hub link
Family Math & Reading nights schedule
Counselor & college advising directory

pages.layout_pattern: Top of page is a sticky filter bar; main area swaps between 'Month Grid', 'Week', and 'Agenda' views; right rail shows a downloadable year-at-a-glance and feed subscribe buttons
sections: View switcher (Month, Week, Agenda) and 'Today' button
Filter bar: School, Category (Holiday, Early Release, Board, Athletics, Performing Arts, PTA)
Color-coded calendar canvas with sticker chips
Event detail flyout with location, audience, attachments
Year-at-a-glance PDF download card
Subscribe via Google / Apple / Outlook buttons
Recurring weekly lunch menu link

pages.layout_pattern: Civic page with a roster strip up top, a 'Next Meeting' hero card, then a searchable table of past agendas/minutes/videos, and a policy library accordion
sections: Board roster strip: photos, names, seats (At-Large, Ward 1-5), terms, email
Next meeting hero: date/time, location, livestream link, agenda PDF, sign up to speak
Past meetings table with search and year filter (agenda, minutes, video columns)
Public comment guidelines and code of conduct
Policy library accordion (1000 Series Governance, 2000 Instruction, etc.)
Annual budget & audit documents grid
Strategic plan progress dashboard

pages.layout_pattern: Editorial bulletin board: featured story column on the left, dated list of posts on the right with sticker category tags, plus a sidebar with newsletter sign-up and press contacts
sections: Featured story hero with photo and pull quote
Category sticker pills: District, Athletics, Arts, Bond, Awards, Weather
Dated post list with thumbnails and reading-time chip
'Sign up for the Maple Hollow Weekly' newsletter card
Press kit, logos, and media contact sidebar
Social feed embed (district Instagram + Facebook)

pages.layout_pattern: Menu of the week table with day columns and meal rows, school-level tabs above (Elementary / Middle / High), and an allergen + nutrition sidebar
sections: School-level tabs (Elementary, Middle, High) and week navigator
Weekly menu grid (Mon-Fri columns; Breakfast, Lunch, Snack rows) with entree photos
Allergen legend and nutrition PDF downloads
Free & reduced meals application CTA
Reload lunch balance button (deep link to portal)
Farm-to-school program highlight
Wellness policy and feedback form

message_intent: Convey a warm, hand-crafted community-school feel rather than corporate district
Demonstrate that every logistical question (bus, lunch, attendance, schedule) has an obvious entry point
Highlight academic breadth across seven campuses and varied programs
Support multilingual families with clear translation affordances
Make board transparency and policy accessibility a first-class feature
content_model: Campus: name, mascot, level, address, principal, phone, bell schedule, enrollment, boundary polygon, programs
CalendarEvent: title, start, end, location, audience, category, color, attachments, ics
BoardMember: name, photo, seat, term, email, bio, committees
BoardMeeting: date, type, agenda, minutes, video, public_comment_signup_open
NewsPost: title, dek, body, hero, category, tags, author, publish_date, reading_time
MenuDay: date, level, breakfast[], lunch[], snack[], allergens
Program: name, description, grades, campuses, contact
BusRoute: number, campus, stops, driver, alerts
PolicyDoc: series, number, title, adopted_date, pdf
Translation: locale, key, value (supports en, es, vi, so)
interactions: Binder left-rail nav with expand/collapse sections and active highlight
Address lookup tied to school + bus route assignment
Calendar view switcher (Month / Week / Agenda) with category filters
Lunch menu week navigator and printable PDF
Role-tabbed sign-in (Parent / Student / Staff) with SSO
Translation dropdown swapping locale across the site
Sticker-pill news filters with animated card re-flow
Map / Grid toggle on the schools directory
asset_needs: District crest with a stylized maple leaf in pastel
Seven mascot illustrations (one per campus) in a consistent flat style
Notebook-paper background texture and washi-tape highlight strips
Photography of classrooms, buses, cafeteria, athletics, arts performances
concepts.mobile_behavior: Binder left-rail nav collapses into a tabbed bottom sheet with section dividers; multi-column dashboards stack with sticky alert at top; calendar defaults to Agenda view; school directory grid becomes a vertical card stack with a 'View on Map' floating button; lunch menu week grid becomes a swipeable day-by-day carousel.
